data.name: Andoris

weaponImprint.name: Aglaea
weaponImprint.trait: Damage taken is reduced by 2% for every Electric debuff the attacker is afflicted with. Maximum reduction of 6%.
weaponImprint.effect: Electric damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 10%. At the end of the action, recovers 5% of maximum HP. If the user has [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967], Electric damage dealt by them and their summons is increased by 20%/24%/28%/32%/36%/40%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to URNC units is increased by 2.5%. If the target is afflicted with any Electric debuffs, this damage is additionally increased by 2.5%.

data.effects: A gentle, approachable Doll. Although she has performance limitations, she does not indulge in self-pity, but instead proactively searches for a place she can call home. A Doll who embraces and accommodates everyone around her, she has become a source of refuge for others without realizing it.

skills.name: Charged Shot
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack to it, and applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to it for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects one enemy unit within 7 tiles, dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack and applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to it for 2 turns.

summon.name: Auto-Turret
summon.unitInfo: Summon. Inherits 50% of Andoris' initial HP, 50% of Andoris' initial attack, and 100% of Andoris' initial defense. Cannot move. Can apply [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Skill range of releasing [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] is increased by 3 tiles.

[summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]'s basic attack, charged Shot's range is increased by 1 tile. Passive Crash Mimicry gains a new effect, increasing Electric damage dealt by self by 30%.

[summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] gains a new passive, En Passant. When enemies in range are about to receive Targeted Electric damage from an allied unit's active attack, launches an Support Action, dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, applying [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] for 2 turns, this effect can only be triggered once per turn.

skills.name: Practice Shot
skills.description: Selects 1 target within 7 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack.

skills.name: Crash Mimicry
skills.description: Cannot be healed or shielded. Immune to [effect:5e16965e-d995-425c-9ba5-8ace79df7840] effects and will not be automatically targeted by the enemy.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Electric damage deal is increased by 30%. Cannot be healed or shielded. Immune to [effect:5e16965e-d995-425c-9ba5-8ace79df7840] effects and will not be automatically targeted by the enemy.

summon.name: Auto-Turret
summon.unitInfo: Summon. Inherits 50% of Andoris' initial HP, 50% of Andoris' initial attack, and 100% of Andoris' initial defense. Cannot move. Can apply [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Skill range of releasing [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] is increased by 3 tiles.

[summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]'s basic attack, charged Shot's range is increased by 1 tile. Passive Crash Mimicry gains a new effect, increasing Electric damage dealt by self by 30%.

[summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] gains a new passive, En Passant. When enemies in range are about to receive Targeted Electric damage from an allied unit's active attack, launches an Support Action, dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, applying [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] for 2 turns, this effect can only be triggered once per turn.

skills.name: Delayed Response
skills.description:
At the start of the battle, Andoris gains [effect:86f58c59-130f-43b4-a94a-36c572b371ea]. This effect can only trigger again after 3 turns.

When an allied unit with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] takes damage, Andoris shares 45% of the [effect:27f19bae-b7f0-4d81-bb6c-fee2348458b4] with it. When performing an active attack on an enemy target with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], Andoris recovers 20% of maximum HP.

When taking damage, Andoris recovers 5% of maximum HP, grants 1 point of Confectance Index, and applies 1 stack of [effect:40a28bbb-9230-4976-966f-39431d332e30] to self and all [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s on the field. If not protected by Cover, Andoris expends 1 point of stability and reduces damage taken by 20%.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the battle, Andoris attack and that of all [effect:344566f5-70f6-44bd-8255-fbc4b6b29ac3]s are increased by a number equal to 30% of Andoris' initial defense and Andoris gains [effect:86f58c59-130f-43b4-a94a-36c572b371ea]. This effect can only trigger again after 3 turns.

When an allied unit with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] takes damage, Andoris shares 45% of the [effect:27f19bae-b7f0-4d81-bb6c-fee2348458b4] with it. When performing an active attack on an enemy target with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], Andoris recovers 20% of maximum HP.

When taking damage, stability damage taken is reduced by 1 point, Andoris recovers 5% of maximum HP, grants 1 point of Confectance Index, and applies 1 stack of [effect:40a28bbb-9230-4976-966f-39431d332e30] to self and all [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s on the field. If not protected by Cover, Andoris expends 1 point of stability and reduces damage taken by 20%.

When [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] is damaged, applies 1 stack of [effect:40a28bbb-9230-4976-966f-39431d332e30] to it and Andoris.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of the battle, Andoris' attack and that of all [effect:344566f5-70f6-44bd-8255-fbc4b6b29ac3]s are increased by a number equal to 30% of Andoris' initial defense. Andoris' maximum stability is increased by 6. Andoris gains [effect:86f58c59-130f-43b4-a94a-36c572b371ea]. This effect can only trigger again after 3 turns. When an allied unit with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] takes damage, Andoris shares 45% of the [effect:27f19bae-b7f0-4d81-bb6c-fee2348458b4] with it. When performing an active attack on an enemy target with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], Andoris recovers 20% of maximum HP.

When taking damage, stability damage taken is reduced by 1 point, Andoris recovers 5% of maximum HP, grants 1 point of Confectance Index, and applies 1 stack of [effect:40a28bbb-9230-4976-966f-39431d332e30] to self and all [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s on the field. If not protected by Cover, Andoris expends 1 point of stability and reduces damage taken by 20%.

When any [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] is damaged, applies 1 stack of [effect:40a28bbb-9230-4976-966f-39431d332e30] to it and Andoris.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: New effects: Stability damage taken is reduced by 1 point. At the start of the battle, Andoris' attack and that of all [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s are increased by a number equal to 30% of Andoris' initial defense. When any [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] is damaged applies 1 stack of [effect:40a28bbb-9230-4976-966f-39431d332e30] to it and Andoris. The effect of [effect:40a28bbb-9230-4976-966f-39431d332e30] is enhanced: Defense boost multiplier is increased by 10%, and the maximum number of stacks is increased by 3.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: At the start of the battle, max stability is increased by 6. The effect of [effect:86f58c59-130f-43b4-a94a-36c572b371ea] is enhanced: When taking fatal damage, Andoris recovers 60% of maximum HP, all stability, and gains [effect:d7897b0c-5cd7-4f39-9ec2-b678468be52f] for 2 rounds.

skills.name: En Passant
skills.description:
When an enemy within range takes targeted Electric damage from an allied unit's active attack, [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] performs 1 [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack, 1 point of stability damage , and applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to it for 2 turns. This effect can only be triggered once per turn.

Note: This skill is inactive until V1.
skills.descriptionLevel2: When an enemy within range takes targeted Electric damage from an allied unit's active attack, [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] performs 1 [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack, 1 point of stability damage , and applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to it for 2 turns. This effect can only be triggered once per turn.

skills.name: Info Relay
skills.description: At the end of the action, applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to 2 enemies within 6 tiles for 2 turns.

summon.name: Auto-Turret
summon.unitInfo: Summon. Inherits 50% of Andoris' initial HP, 50% of Andoris' initial attack, and 100% of Andoris' initial defense. Cannot move. Can apply [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623].

skills.name: Gentle Offensive
skills.description: Summons one [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] on an empty tile within 3 tiles, up to a maximum of 2. When more than 2 [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s are created, the earliest created [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] self-destructs. Whenever any [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] dies, Andoris gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This skill can be used again after being used.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Summons one [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] on an empty tile within 6 tiles, up to a maximum of 2. When more than 2 [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s are created, the earliest created [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] self-destructs. Whenever any [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] dies, Andoris gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This skill can be used again after being used.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Summons one [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] on an empty tile within 6 tiles, up to a maximum of 3. When more than 3 [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s are created, the earliest created [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] self-destructs. Whenever any [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] dies, Andoris gains 1 point of Confectance Index. For every [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] on the field, allied units gain 10% attack boost upon dealing Electric damage. After using this skill, Andoris gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Skill range of releasing [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] is increased by 3 tiles.

[summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]'s basic attack, charged Shot's range is increased by 1 tile. Passive Crash Mimicry gains a new effect, increasing Electric damage dealt by self by 30%.

[summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] gains a new passive, En Passant. When enemies in range are about to receive Targeted Electric damage from an allied unit's active attack, launches an Support Action, dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, applying [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] for 2 turns, this effect can only be triggered once per turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
The maximum number of [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] is increased from 2 to 3, and [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]'s Confectance Index cost is reduced by 1 point.

Added effect: For each [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] on the field, allied units gain 10% attack boost upon dealing Electric damage.

Post-usage effect enhanced to gaining [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] after skill usage.

skills.name: Streamlined Tactics
skills.description: Selects an enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Electric damage equal to 110% of attack to it. Applies [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] for 2 turns before the attack.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects an enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Electric damage equal to 110% of attack to it. Applies [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] for 2 turns before the attack.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] gains a new effect: When a target with [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] ends its action, it applies [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] for 2 turns to all allied units without [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] within 3 tiles. When taking Electric damage, the damage taken is increased by 15%.

skills.name: Fortification Protocol
skills.description: Andoris recovers 8 points of stability. Applies 2 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], along with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] which lasts for 3 turns to all allied Dolls. Andoris gains [effect:d7897b0c-5cd7-4f39-9ec2-b678468be52f] for 2 rounds.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Andoris recovers all stability, 20% of maximum HP, and cleanses all debuffs on self. Applies 2 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], along with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] which lasts for 3 turns to all allied Dolls. Andoris gains [effect:d7897b0c-5cd7-4f39-9ec2-b678468be52f] for 2 rounds. When Andoris is on the field, she applies [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] and [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] to all allied units with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Effects enhanced: Andoris recovers all stability, 20% of maximum HP and cleanses all debuffs on self.

When Andoris is on the field, she applies [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] and [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] to all allied Dolls with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967].

keys.displayTitle: Affinity Key - Rain Nourishes in Silence

keys.effect: At the start of the turn, for every Electric debuff on the field, increases damage dealt by 5%, to a maximum of 10%. This effect lasts until the end of the round.

At the end of [effect:344566f5-70f6-44bd-8255-fbc4b6b29ac3]'s action, if no damage was dealt, restore 2 points of Confectance Index to Andoris. Before [effect:344566f5-70f6-44bd-8255-fbc4b6b29ac3] attacks an enemy with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], increase attack by 50%.

When an allied unit with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] takes damage, Andoris shares 65% of the [effect:27f19bae-b7f0-4d81-bb6c-fee2348458b4] with it. After taking damage on the behalf of an allied unit, Andoris recovers HP equal to 0.5% of maximum HP for each stack of [effect:40a28bbb-9230-4976-966f-39431d332e30] on all friendly units.

At the end of Andoris' action, apply [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] to the nearest allied doll for 3 turns.
At the start of the battle, gains 3 points of Confectance Index.
When dealing Electric damage, if the target is in Stability Break and has [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5], then deals additional fixed damage equal to 10% of attack.
When Andoris applies [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] to allied units, she cleanses 2 debuffs on them and all her Auto-Turrets.

When Andoris is on the field, if an allied unit with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] ends its actions within 3 tiles of another allied unit with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967], it gains 1 stack of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a].
At the start of the battle, Andoris applies [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] to all allied Dolls for 3 turns.
At the start of the battle, applies [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] to the enemy unit with the highest max HP for 2 turns.

vertebrae.effect:
Skill range of releasing [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] is increased by 3 tiles.

[summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]'s basic attack, charged Shot's range is increased by 1 tile. Passive Crash Mimicry gains a new effect, increasing Electric damage dealt by self by 30%.

[summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] gains a new passive, En Passant. When enemies in range are about to receive Targeted Electric damage from an allied unit's active attack, launches an Support Action, dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, applying [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] for 2 turns, this effect can only be triggered once per turn.

doll.name: Andoris
doll.effects: A gentle, approachable Doll. Although she has performance limitations, she does not indulge in self-pity, but instead proactively searches for a place she can call home. A Doll who embraces and accommodates everyone around her, she has become a source of refuge for others without realizing it.

When Andoris is on the field, she applies [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] and [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] to all allied Dolls with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967].

doll.name: Andoris
doll.effects: A gentle, approachable Doll. Although she has performance limitations, she does not indulge in self-pity, but instead proactively searches for a place she can call home. A Doll who embraces and accommodates everyone around her, she has become a source of refuge for others without realizing it.

skillsLevel2.name: Fortification Protocol
skillsLevel2.description: Andoris recovers 8 points of stability. Applies 2 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], along with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] which lasts for 3 turns to all allied Dolls. Andoris gains [effect:d7897b0c-5cd7-4f39-9ec2-b678468be52f] for 2 rounds.
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel2: Andoris recovers all stability, 20% of maximum HP, and cleanses all debuffs on self. Applies 2 stacks of [effect:10b11942-01c9-4937-b446-1fe44c50d88a], along with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] which lasts for 3 turns to all allied Dolls. Andoris gains [effect:d7897b0c-5cd7-4f39-9ec2-b678468be52f] for 2 rounds. When Andoris is on the field, she applies [effect:968e9913-e847-462c-be10-87bc8fc0f827] and [effect:82c6b99c-0a5e-4707-b81e-b6700f1b6dd8] to all allied units with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967].

vertebrae.effect: New effects: Stability damage taken is reduced by 1 point. At the start of the battle, Andoris' attack and that of all [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s are increased by a number equal to 30% of Andoris' initial defense. When any [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] is damaged applies 1 stack of [effect:40a28bbb-9230-4976-966f-39431d332e30] to it and Andoris. The effect of [effect:40a28bbb-9230-4976-966f-39431d332e30] is enhanced: Defense boost multiplier is increased by 10%, and the maximum number of stacks is increased by 3.

doll.name: Andoris
doll.effects: A gentle, approachable Doll. Although she has performance limitations, she does not indulge in self-pity, but instead proactively searches for a place she can call home. A Doll who embraces and accommodates everyone around her, she has become a source of refuge for others without realizing it.

skillsLevel2.name: Delayed Response
skillsLevel2.description:
At the start of the battle, Andoris gains [effect:86f58c59-130f-43b4-a94a-36c572b371ea]. This effect can only trigger again after 3 turns.

When an allied unit with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] takes damage, Andoris shares 45% of the [effect:27f19bae-b7f0-4d81-bb6c-fee2348458b4] with it. When performing an active attack on an enemy target with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], Andoris recovers 20% of maximum HP.

When taking damage, Andoris recovers 5% of maximum HP, grants 1 point of Confectance Index, and applies 1 stack of [effect:40a28bbb-9230-4976-966f-39431d332e30] to self and all [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s on the field. If not protected by Cover, Andoris expends 1 point of stability and reduces damage taken by 20%.
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of the battle, Andoris attack and that of all [effect:344566f5-70f6-44bd-8255-fbc4b6b29ac3]s are increased by a number equal to 30% of Andoris' initial defense and Andoris gains [effect:86f58c59-130f-43b4-a94a-36c572b371ea]. This effect can only trigger again after 3 turns.

When an allied unit with [effect:f3c29056-b252-443d-bf3d-55462b514967] takes damage, Andoris shares 45% of the [effect:27f19bae-b7f0-4d81-bb6c-fee2348458b4] with it. When performing an active attack on an enemy target with [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623], Andoris recovers 20% of maximum HP.

When taking damage, stability damage taken is reduced by 1 point, Andoris recovers 5% of maximum HP, grants 1 point of Confectance Index, and applies 1 stack of [effect:40a28bbb-9230-4976-966f-39431d332e30] to self and all [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s on the field. If not protected by Cover, Andoris expends 1 point of stability and reduces damage taken by 20%.

vertebrae.effect: [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] gains a new effect: When a target with [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] ends its action, it applies [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] for 2 turns to all allied units without [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] within 3 tiles. When taking Electric damage, the damage taken is increased by 15%.

A Doll who embraces and accommodates everyone around her, she has become a source of refuge for others without realizing it.

skillsLevel2.name: Streamlined Tactics
skillsLevel2.description: Selects an enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Electric damage equal to 110% of attack to it. Applies [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] for 2 turns before the attack.
skillsLevel2.descriptionLevel2: Selects an enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Electric damage equal to 110% of attack to it. Applies [effect:f8bb89d5-7fb8-4d07-9de9-489f791120f5] for 2 turns before the attack.

vertebrae.effect:
The maximum number of [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] is increased from 2 to 3, and [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]'s Confectance Index cost is reduced by 1 point.

Added effect: For each [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] on the field, allied units gain 10% attack boost upon dealing Electric damage.

Post-usage effect enhanced to gaining [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] after skill usage.

doll.name: Andoris
doll.effects: A gentle, approachable Doll. Although she has performance limitations, she does not indulge in self-pity, but instead proactively searches for a place she can call home. A Doll who embraces and accommodates everyone around her, she has become a source of refuge for others without realizing it.

skillsLevel3.name: Gentle Offensive
skillsLevel3.description: Summons one [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] on an empty tile within 3 tiles, up to a maximum of 2. When more than 2 [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s are created, the earliest created [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] self-destructs. Whenever any [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] dies, Andoris gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This skill can be used again after being used.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2: Summons one [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] on an empty tile within 6 tiles, up to a maximum of 2. When more than 2 [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s are created, the earliest created [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] self-destructs. Whenever any [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] dies, Andoris gains 1 point of Confectance Index. This skill can be used again after being used.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3: Summons one [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] on an empty tile within 6 tiles, up to a maximum of 3. When more than 3 [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]s are created, the earliest created [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] self-destructs. Whenever any [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] dies, Andoris gains 1 point of Confectance Index. For every [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] on the field, allied units gain 10% attack boost upon dealing Electric damage. After using this skill, Andoris gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

summons.name: Auto-Turret
summons.unitInfo: Summon. Inherits 50% of Andoris' initial HP, 50% of Andoris' initial attack, and 100% of Andoris' initial defense. Cannot move. Can apply [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623].

skills.name: Charged Shot
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 6 tiles, dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack to it, and applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to it for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects one enemy unit within 7 tiles, dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack and applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to it for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
Skill range of releasing [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] is increased by 3 tiles.

[summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f]'s basic attack, charged Shot's range is increased by 1 tile. Passive Crash Mimicry gains a new effect, increasing Electric damage dealt by self by 30%.

[summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] gains a new passive, En Passant. When enemies in range are about to receive Targeted Electric damage from an allied unit's active attack, launches an Support Action, dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, applying [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] for 2 turns, this effect can only be triggered once per turn.

skills.name: Info Relay
skills.description: At the end of the action, applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to 2 enemies within 6 tiles for 2 turns.

skills.name: Crash Mimicry
skills.description: Cannot be healed or shielded. Immune to [effect:5e16965e-d995-425c-9ba5-8ace79df7840] effects and will not be automatically targeted by the enemy.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Electric damage deal is increased by 30%. Cannot be healed or shielded. Immune to [effect:5e16965e-d995-425c-9ba5-8ace79df7840] effects and will not be automatically targeted by the enemy.

Skill range of releasing [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] is increased by 3 tiles.

[summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] gains a new passive, En Passant. When enemies in range are about to receive Targeted Electric damage from an allied unit's active attack, launches an Support Action, dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack and 1 point of stability damage, applying [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] for 2 turns, this effect can only be triggered once per turn.

skills.name: En Passant
skills.description:
When an enemy within range takes targeted Electric damage from an allied unit's active attack, [summon:bc582d96-07b9-4b7d-8aab-e4e2dd66909f] performs 1 [effect:ab2e634f-d257-44e3-af90-ce66a6ac43f3], dealing Electric damage equal to 100% of attack, 1 point of stability damage , and applies [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] to it for 2 turns. This effect can only be triggered once per turn.

Note: This skill is inactive until V1.

imagoforms.effect: When attacked by enemy units with Electric debuffs, damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Electric damage dealt is increased by 5%.
When not protected by cover, damage taken is reduced by 5%.
When stability is greater than 0, max HP is increased by 12%.
